disease_info.description: Parasitic skin infections involve organisms such as mites, lice, or larvae invading or residing on the skin. They typically cause intense itching, burrows, tracks, or visible movement.
disease_info.common_symptoms: Intense itching, burrows, red bumps, rashes, visible tracks
disease_info.recommended_action: Use antiparasitic medication, wash bedding/clothes, treat close contacts if required.
disease_info.related_conditions: Allergic dermatitis, bacterial infection from scratching
disease_info.image_indicators: Burrow lines, papules, clusters, serpiginous tracks
